assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-13: Step 1 under 'Branch Operations' shows 'git checkout TC-9005 && git pull' with explicit note 'This checks out the feature branch TC-9005 (NOT main) as specified in the Target Branch section of the task.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 23-25: Step 3 under 'Branch Operations' shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"' with note 'The PR is opened with --base TC-9005 to target the feature branch, NOT --base main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 16-19: Step 2 under 'Branch Operations' shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' with explicit note 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the Jira issue ID for this task), NOT TC-9005 (the feature branch).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 27-35: Section 'Pre-Implementation: Inspect Existing Code (Constraint 1.5)' explicitly lists all three files: (1) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' to understand migration patterns, (2) 'entity/src/advisory.rs' to verify the advisory entity no longer references the status column, (3) 'migration/src/lib.rs' to inspect how existing migrations are registered.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 72-74: Shows 'git commit --trailer=\'Assisted-by: Claude Code\'' under the 'Committed with:' section.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 61-69: Commit message shows 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and description) followed by body text and footer 'TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 3-5: Section 'Target Branch Extraction' states 'The task description specifies Target Branch: TC-9005. This is a feature branch (linked issue: "is incorporated by TC-9005"), not main. All branch operations and PR targeting must use TC-9005 as the base.'
